series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of regulated entity correspondence and reports providing updates on patron attendance including various incidents and issues.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format until no longer of current or of administrative value, then destroy. Once converted into verified machine-readable format, if at all, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of current or of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
